title: Deployment Readiness Engine
purpose: Implement deployment governance validation system to prevent unsafe deployments, enforce operational readiness, and validate governance integrity before release.
architectural_constraints: Deployment readiness is a governed state transition
Must not block hotfixes: emergency bypass with audit

deliverables.description: Synchronized to M25 / T25.1 with completed governance wave backfill
Updated to M25 Deployment Governance, phase 25

acceptance_criteria: Deployment blockers listed with remediation guidance
All runtime state files synchronized to M25 / T25.1
Dependency graph includes M11-M25 with valid acyclic topology

failure_modes.mitigation: Emergency bypass with mandatory audit trail, expedited review path

failure_modes.scenario: Readiness criteria drift from operational reality
failure_modes.mitigation: Criteria versioned with protocols, regular review of blocker thresholds

traceability.description: Amended T25.1 with governance reconciliation scope, expanded deliverables and acceptance criteria
